subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Divine Throne, and We have taken cognizance of its contents. We shall ordain for thee that which shall profit thee. Verily, thy Lord is the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی العرش کتابک و عرفنا ما فیه سوف نقضی لک ما ینفعک ان ربک لهو العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
